metadata.source: Follow-up from Live Register v1 first slice.

title: Integrate live register into what-now
goal: Make what-now show live thread focus and candidate observations as source-bound context without changing eligibility, queue truth or claim authority.

acceptance.assertion: what-now output includes a bounded live_register summary when events exist.
Live-register entries do not override queue lane order or hard blockers.
Regression tests cover live context presence and no change to claim eligibility.
